name: dev.kubedb/mcp-server
description: Manage KubeDB databases on Kubernetes and OpenShift: provision Postgres, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, Elasticsearch and 30+ other engines, run day-2 operations (upgrades, scaling, volume expansion, restarts, TLS, credential rotation), configure autoscaling, and inspect health, versions, and connection info.

environmentVariables.name: KUBEDB_MCP_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set true to expose only read tools

environmentVariables.name: KUBEDB_MCP_DISABLE_DESTRUCTIVE
environmentVariables.description: Set true to disable delete and other destructive operations

environmentVariables.name: KUBEDB_MCP_ALLOW_CREDENTIALS
environmentVariables.description: Set true to let kubedb_get_connection_info return decoded database credentials
